title: SkillMetaResponse v1
description: Wire format for the agentkey_skill_meta MCP tool. See protocol/skill-meta-v1.md for the full contract.

protocol_version.description: Protocol version. v1 servers MUST emit literal 1.

skill_version_latest.description: Latest published skill release, semver without 'v' prefix. Empty string is allowed only when the server cannot determine the latest version (e.g. offline, GitHub rate-limited).

client_detected.description: Lowercase short name of the MCP client derived from initialize.clientInfo.name. Use 'unknown' when clientInfo is absent or unrecognized.

update_doc_url.description: Stable documentation URL describing how to upgrade. MUST be present in every response, regardless of client.

update_command.description: Optional. Concrete one-line upgrade instruction for the detected client. When present, update_command_kind MUST also be present.

update_command_kind.description: Optional. Indicates how to interpret update_command. Skill rules treat unknown future kinds as 'manual_ui'.

release_notes_url.description: Optional. URL of the human-readable release notes for skill_version_latest.
